読み仮名には強調符号は付けない。

revision.text:
{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類=[[祭り]] |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[平安時代]] |会場=[[鳥羽神明社]]
（[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''鳥羽の火祭り'''（とばのひまつり）は、毎年2月第2日曜日に[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]の[[鳥羽神明社]]にて行われる[[祭]]（[[火祭り]]）である。 == 歴史 == 祭りの起源は定かではないが、約1200年前の[[平安時代]]に始まったとされる[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽神明社　鳥羽の火祭り]。 2004年（平成16年）2月16日、国の[[重要無形民俗文化財]] に指定された。 == 次第 == 竹と茅で作った高さ5mの「すずみ」二基に火がつけられ、「福地」と「乾地」のふたつの地区に分かれた神男と、かぶる頭巾の形から「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者が「すずみ」の中に飛び込んで神木と十二縄を競って取り出す[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now ～天下の奇祭　鳥羽の火祭り～]。その勝敗により、その年の天候と豊凶や作物の出来具合を占う。 毎年2月第2日曜日に開催される。[[西尾市立一色学びの館]]には鳥羽の火祭りに関する常設展示がある。 == ギャラリー == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|「すずみ」を揺らす奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|燃え盛る炎の中に飛び込んでいく奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|神木と十二縄を取り出す Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[火祭り]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽の火祭り] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|燃え上がるたいまつ「すずみ」に挑む「鳥羽の火祭り」}}（朝日新聞社提供、2019年2月10日公開） {{Event-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはのひまつり}} [[Category:重要無形民俗文化財]] [[Category:愛知県の祭り]] [[Category:西尾市の文化]]

revision.text:
{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:original pages]][[category:new pages]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}

The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:new pages]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]][[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]][[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]][[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]][[Category:original pages]][[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]][[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages to try to fix ills]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類=[[祭り]] |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[平安時代]] |会場=[[鳥羽神明社]]
（[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''鳥羽の火祭り'''（とばのひまつり）は、毎年2月第2日曜日に[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]の鳥羽神明社にて行われる[[祭]]（[[火祭り]]）である。 == 概要 == [[File:鳥羽神明社 (愛知県幡豆郡幡豆町鳥羽) - panoramio (4).jpg|thumb|230px|鳥羽神明社]] 祭りの起源は定かではないが、約1200年前の[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年）に始まったとされる{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽神明社　鳥羽の火祭り]。 長いあいだ、旧暦の1月7日に行われていたが、1970年から2月の第2日曜日に行われるようになった{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 2004年2月16日、国の[[重要無形民俗文化財]] に指定された{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/302/768 | title=鳥羽の火祭り | publisher=国指定文化財等データベース | date= | accessdate=2025-02-08 }}。 祭りでは鳥羽神明社の西を流れる水路（宮西川）を境に鳥羽地区を東西に分け、西を「福地（ふくじ）」、東を「乾地（かんじ）」と呼ぶ。それぞれの地区から1人ずつ選ばれた原則25歳の厄年の男性「神男（しんおとこ）」が、祭りの中心を務める{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。前年の神男は「添え棒」といい、その年の神男を補佐し、指導する{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 本番当日の朝、神男は身を清めるため、氷水でみそぎを行う。さらに午後、神男と他の奉仕者はふんどし姿で三河湾に入り、みそぎを行う{{cite web | author= | url=https://news.ntv.co.jp/n/ctv/category/society/ct3f434a5fcdf142dd88c06b1f4e8023ef | title=東西の神男が炎に立ち向かう！天下の奇祭「鳥羽の火祭り」に密着 愛知・西尾市 | publisher=中京テレビ | date=2024-02-26 | accessdate=2025-02-06 }}。 祭りのシンボルは「すずみ」と呼ばれる5メートルの造形物で、2基つくられる。すずみを1基つくるにはススキが2トン、青竹が60本必要とされる。すずみを突き刺す「ゆすり棒」は松の木からつくられる。「すずみ」2基に火がつけられ、神男と、かぶる頭巾の形から「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者が「すずみ」の中に飛び込んで神木と十二縄を競って取り出す[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now ～天下の奇祭　鳥羽の火祭り～]。その勝敗により、その年の天候と豊凶や作物の出来具合を占う。 [[西尾市立一色学びの館]]には鳥羽の火祭りに関する常設展示がある。 == ギャラリー == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|「すずみ」を揺らす奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|燃え盛る炎の中に飛び込んでいく奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|神木と十二縄を取り出す Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite journal|和書 |url =https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/_res/projects/default_project/_page_/001/003/363/a02-05spl.pdf |title =特集 鳥羽の火祭り |journal =広報 NISHIO | issue =1415 | volume = |publisher =西尾市役所 |date =2017年2月1日 |ref= {{SfnRef|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[火祭り]] == 外部リンク == {{commonscat|Toba-shinmeisha}} * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽の火祭り] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|燃え上がるたいまつ「すずみ」に挑む「鳥羽の火祭り」}}（朝日新聞社提供、2019年2月10日公開） {{Event-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはのひまつり}} [[Category:重要無形民俗文化財]] [[Category:愛知県の祭り]] [[Category:西尾市の文化]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類=[[祭り]] |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年） |会場=[[鳥羽神明社]]
（[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''鳥羽の火祭り'''（とばのひまつり）は、毎年2月第2日曜日に[[愛知県]][[西尾市]]の鳥羽神明社にて行われる[[祭]]（[[火祭り]]）である。 == 概要 == [[File:鳥羽神明社 (愛知県幡豆郡幡豆町鳥羽) - panoramio (4).jpg|thumb|230px|鳥羽神明社]] 祭りの起源は定かではないが、約1200年前の[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年）に始まったとされる{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽神明社　鳥羽の火祭り]。 長いあいだ、旧暦の1月7日に行われていたが、1970年から2月の第2日曜日に行われるようになった{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 2004年2月16日、国の[[重要無形民俗文化財]] に指定された{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/302/768 | title=鳥羽の火祭り | publisher=国指定文化財等データベース | date= | accessdate=2025-02-08 }}。 祭りでは鳥羽神明社の西を流れる水路（宮西川）を境に鳥羽地区を東西に分け、西を「福地（ふくじ）」、東を「乾地（かんじ）」と呼ぶ。それぞれの地区から1人ずつ選ばれた原則25歳の厄年の男性「神男（しんおとこ）」が、祭りの中心を務める{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。前年の神男は「添え棒」といい、その年の神男を補佐し、指導する{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 本番当日の朝、神男は身を清めるため、氷水でみそぎを行う。さらに午後、神男と他の奉仕者はふんどし姿で三河湾に入り、みそぎを行う{{cite web | author= | url=https://news.ntv.co.jp/n/ctv/category/society/ct3f434a5fcdf142dd88c06b1f4e8023ef | title=東西の神男が炎に立ち向かう！天下の奇祭「鳥羽の火祭り」に密着 愛知・西尾市 | publisher=中京テレビ | date=2024-02-26 | accessdate=2025-02-06 }}。 祭りのシンボルは「すずみ」と呼ばれる5メートルの造形物で、2基つくられる。すずみを1基つくるにはススキが2トン、青竹が60本必要とされる。すずみを突き刺す「ゆすり棒」は松の木からつくられる。「すずみ」2基に火がつけられ、神男と、かぶる頭巾の形から「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者が「すずみ」の中に飛び込んで神木と十二縄を競って取り出す[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now ～天下の奇祭　鳥羽の火祭り～]。その勝敗により、その年の天候と豊凶や作物の出来具合を占う。 [[西尾市立一色学びの館]]には鳥羽の火祭りに関する常設展示がある。 == ギャラリー == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|「すずみ」を揺らす奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|燃え盛る炎の中に飛び込んでいく奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|神木と十二縄を取り出す Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite journal|和書 |url =https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/_res/projects/default_project/_page_/001/003/363/a02-05spl.pdf |title =特集 鳥羽の火祭り |journal =広報 NISHIO | issue =1415 | volume = |publisher =西尾市役所 |date =2017年2月1日 |ref= {{SfnRef|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[火祭り]] == 外部リンク == {{commonscat|Toba-shinmeisha}} * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽の火祭り] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|燃え上がるたいまつ「すずみ」に挑む「鳥羽の火祭り」}}（朝日新聞社提供、2019年2月10日公開） {{Event-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはのひまつり}} [[Category:重要無形民俗文化財]] [[Category:愛知県の祭り]] [[Category:西尾市の文化]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類=[[祭り]] |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年） |会場=[[鳥羽神明社]]

revision.text:
{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Toba Fire Festival-qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Toba Fire Festival-qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Toba Fire Festival-qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Toba Fire Festival-qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. （{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]][[category:qq close]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]]

revision.text:
{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] （{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Toba Fire Festival]][[Category:qq]] {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=draft}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|12=draft}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=draft}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市|12=draft}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|12=draft}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|12=draft}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=draft}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=draft}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|12=draft}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toba Fire Festival]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]]

The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=draft}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|12=draft}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category: tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toba Fire Festival]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類=[[祭り]] |画像= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |画像サイズ= |画像説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年） |会場=鳥羽神明社
（[[愛知県]][[西尾市]][[鳥羽町 (西尾市)|鳥羽町]]西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''鳥羽の火祭り'''（とばのひまつり）は、毎年2月第2日曜日に[[愛知県]][[西尾市]][[鳥羽町 (西尾市)|鳥羽町]]の鳥羽神明社にて行われる[[祭]]（[[火祭り]]）である。 == 概要 == [[File:鳥羽神明社 (愛知県幡豆郡幡豆町鳥羽) - panoramio (4).jpg|thumb|230px|鳥羽神明社の境内]] 祭りの起源は定かではないが、約1200年前の[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間（806年 - 810年）に始まったとされる{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽神明社　鳥羽の火祭り]。 長いあいだ、旧暦の1月7日に行われていたが、1970年から2月の第2日曜日に行われるようになった{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 2004年2月16日、国の[[重要無形民俗文化財]]に指定された{{cite web |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/bsys/maindetails/302/768 | title=鳥羽の火祭り | publisher=国指定文化財等データベース | date= | accessdate=2025-02-08 }}。 祭りでは鳥羽神明社の西を流れる水路（宮西川）を境に鳥羽地区を東西に分け、西を「福地（ふくじ）」、東を「乾地（かんじ）」と呼ぶ。それぞれの地区から1人ずつ選ばれた原則25歳の厄年の男性「神男（しんおとこ）」が、祭りの中心を務める{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。前年の神男は「添え棒」といい、その年の神男を補佐し、指導する{{Sfn|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号|pp=2-5}}。 本番当日の朝、神男は身を清めるため、氷水でみそぎを行う。さらに午後、神男と他の奉仕者はふんどし姿で三河湾に入り、みそぎを行う{{cite web | author= | url=https://news.ntv.co.jp/n/ctv/category/society/ct3f434a5fcdf142dd88c06b1f4e8023ef | title=東西の神男が炎に立ち向かう！天下の奇祭「鳥羽の火祭り」に密着 愛知・西尾市 | publisher=中京テレビ | date=2024-02-26 | accessdate=2025-02-06 }}。 祭りのシンボルは「すずみ」と呼ばれる5メートルの造形物で、2基つくられる。すずみを1基つくるにはススキが2トン、青竹が60本必要とされる。すずみを突き刺す「ゆすり棒」は松の木からつくられる。「すずみ」2基に火がつけられ、神男と、かぶる頭巾の形から「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者が「すずみ」の中に飛び込んで神木と十二縄を競って取り出す[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now ～天下の奇祭　鳥羽の火祭り～]。その勝敗により、その年の天候と豊凶や作物の出来具合を占う。 [[西尾市立一色学びの館]]には鳥羽の火祭りに関する常設展示がある。 == ギャラリー == Toba-Shinmeisha-1.jpg|お祓いを受ける奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|「すずみ」を揺らす奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|燃え盛る炎の中に飛び込んでいく奉仕者 Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|神木と十二縄を取り出す Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite journal|和書 |url =https://www.city.nishio.aichi.jp/_res/projects/default_project/_page_/001/003/363/a02-05spl.pdf |title =特集 鳥羽の火祭り |journal =広報 NISHIO | issue =1415 | volume = |publisher =西尾市役所 |date =2017年2月1日 |ref= {{SfnRef|『広報 NISHIO』2017年2月1日号}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[火祭り]] == 外部リンク == {{commonscat|Toba Fire Festival}} * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html　鳥羽の火祭り] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|燃え上がるたいまつ「すずみ」に挑む「鳥羽の火祭り」}}（朝日新聞社提供、2019年2月10日公開） {{Event-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とはのひまつり}} [[Category:重要無形民俗文化財]] [[Category:愛知県の祭り]] [[Category:西尾市の文化]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|ja|平安時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toba Fire Festival]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toba Fire Festival]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]] {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Fire festival|ja|火祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toba Fire Festival]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|qq=}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=}}
（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Culture in Nishio]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[en:Toba Fire Festival]] [[Category:西尾市の文化]]

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|qq=}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}}

{{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals of Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toba Fire Festival]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}}

（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|qq=|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}}

（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}}

（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]
