[[sn:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q64539503]] Wikidata name: Toba Fire Festival [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

[[commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[sn:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q64539503]] Wikidata name: Toba Fire Festival [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q64539503}}

[[commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[sn:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q64539503]] Wikidata name: Toba Fire Festival [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催=[[:en:Heian period|Heian period]] |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（[[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]][[:en:Nishio|Nishio]]鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]].[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * [[:en:Festival of fire|Fire festival]] == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[sn:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q64539503]] Wikidata name: Toba Fire Festival [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:57, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[sn:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival|1=Fire Festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[co:commons:Category:Toba Fire Festival]][[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{イベントインフォメーション |イベント名称=鳥羽の火祭り |英文表記=Toba Fire Festival |種類={{ill|Festival|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132241}} |image= [[File:Toba Fire Festival3.jpg|300px]] |imageサイズ= |image説明= 火がついた「すずみ」に飛び込む「ネコ」と呼ばれる奉仕者 |通称= |正式名称=鳥羽大篝火 |旧名称= |開催時期=2月第2日曜日 |初回開催={{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} |会場={{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
（{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio|1=Nishio}}鳥羽町西迫89） |主催=鳥羽火祭り保存会 |共催= |後援= |協賛= |企画制作= |協力= |運営= |プロデューサー= |出展数= |来場者数= |会場アクセス名= |最寄駅= |直通バス= |駐車場= |URL=http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html |特記事項= }} '''Toba no Himatsuri''' (鳥羽の火祭り) is a {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival|1=Fire Festival}} held annually on the second Sunday of February at the {{ill|Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja|鳥羽神明社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toba Shinmei Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio|1=Nishio}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. == History == The origins of the festival are uncertain, but it is believed to have started approximately 1,200 years ago during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}.[http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Shinmei Shrine - Toba Fire Festival] On February 16, 2004 (Heisei 16), it was designated as a {{ill|Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|ja|重要無形民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|1=National Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6573893}} by the Japanese government. == Events == Two 5-meter-high "suzumi," structures made of bamboo and thatch, are set ablaze. Divided into the "Fukuji" and "Kanji" districts, the shrine's sacred men and volunteers, referred to as "Neko" due to their hooded headgear, leap into the burning "suzumi" to retrieve sacred wood and twelve ropes.[https://www.aichi-now.jp/spots/detail/144/ Aichi Now - Toba Fire Festival] The results determine predictions for the year's weather, harvest, and crop conditions. The festival is held annually on the second Sunday of February. The {{ill|Isshiki Manabino Museum|ja|西尾市立一色学びの館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isshiki Manabino Museum|qq=}} features a permanent exhibition on the Toba Fire Festival. == Gallery == Toba Fire Festival1.jpg|Volunteers shaking the "suzumi" Toba Fire Festival2.jpg Toba Fire Festival6.jpg|Volunteers diving into the blazing flames Toba Fire Festival5.jpg Toba Fire Festival4.jpg Toba Fire Festival7.jpg|Retrieving the sacred wood and twelve ropes Toba Fire Festival8.jpg == References == {{Reflist}} == See also == * {{ill|Festival of fire|en|Festival of fire|WD=Q3135724|lt=Fire festival|1=Fire Festival}} == External links == * [http://www.katch.ne.jp/~toba-shinmeisha/himatsuri/index.html Toba Fire Festival Official Website] *{{YouTube|PhnYQMSsieU|Blazing "Suzumi" Challenge: Toba Fire Festival}} (Provided by Asahi Shimbun, Published February 10, 2019) {{Event-stub}} {{translated page|ja|鳥羽の火祭り|version=104593163|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鳥羽の火祭り]] {{Commons category|Toba Fire Festival}} {{wikidata link|Q64539503}} [[Category:Culture of Nishio]] [[Category:Festivals in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
